sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111353" key="filocenofw=n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλοξενοφῶν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111353.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of Xenophon,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0010.tlg007.perseus-grc1:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
